title: bupleurum ajanense var. alpinum
intro: Bupleurum ajanense var. alpinum, also known as Ajan Bupleurum, is a plant species that belongs to the parsley family (Apiaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum ajanense var. alpinum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting liver health. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including teas, decoctions, and infusions, to promote overall well-being and boost the immune system.
